description.ko: 지각에 새겨진 풍부한 질감과 고대 역사를 보여주는, 시간이 조각한 지질학적 서사입니다.
description.en: A geological narrative carved by time, showcasing the rich textures and ancient history embedded in the Earth's crust.

prompt: Hyper-realistic satellite photography of TERRA-1, titled 'The Mineral Vein Mosaic.' A top-down macro perspective of a high-altitude plateau where #8B4513 sienna earth and #D2691E ochre sedimentary layers are cut by deep #2F4F4F slate mineral canyons. Sharp #F4A460 sand dunes drift across the surface, creating patterns of frozen motion. Tactile texture showing every grain of sand and crystalline fracture. Cinematic natural lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed geological mapping.
